rankings.reason: Best alignment with the 2050 futuristic theme, incorporating advanced AI, robotics, and immersive VR experiences.
Strong focus on seamless, personalized technology, though it lacks the creative flair of the top option.
Good narrative flow, but the futuristic elements are limited to basic sleeping pods and standard biometrics.
Weakest because it describes an existing airport rather than a creative, futuristic vision for 2050.
